positive: A whimsical, maximalist illustration of a cluster of diverse celestial bodies floating through deep space. The main subjects are various stylized planets and moons, ranging from Saturn-like rings and small, crystalline asteroid formations to glowing nebula clouds. The composition should feature strong, clean silhouettes against a midnight blue to deep violet gradient background. Use a vibrant, neon-pop color palette (electric teal, magenta, luminous gold, cyan) for the celestial objects, contrasting sharply with the dark background. The style should be highly detailed digital illustration, reminiscent of Art Nouveau mixed with modern cosmic vaporwave aesthetics. Ensure clear outlines suitable for screen printing on apparel. Central, balanced composition, high contrast, smooth gradients, studio lighting feel.
negative: blur, low quality, watermark, text, logo, signature, artifact, noise, messy, bad anatomy, cropped, extra limbs, ugly, grainy, disfigured, realistic photo, 3d render, photorealism
